tasks.title: Example: Demo task list
tasks.description: Sample tasks to demonstrate BLXCode task tracking. Safe to edit or delete.
tasks.notes: These are example items only; feel free to rename, re-parent, or remove them.

tasks.title: Example: Change status flow
tasks.description: Try marking this task as in_progress, then completed, to see how status updates look.
tasks.notes: Tip: You can drag tasks to reorder them.

tasks.title: Example: Personalize this task
tasks.description: Edit the title/description and add your own subtasks.
tasks.notes: You can nest tasks multiple levels deep.

tasks.title: Example: Link tasks to a plan
tasks.description: Use plan files under .agents/plans/ to capture multi-step work. Then load the plan to sync tasks.
tasks.notes: Create one plan via plan_create, then call plan_load to sync tasks.
